pokemon:pumpkaboo.name: Pumpkaboo
pokemon:pumpkaboo.summary: It is said to carry wandering spirits to the place where they belong so they can move on.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It is said to carry wandering spirits to the place where they belong so they can move on.
The pumpkin body is inhabited by a spirit trapped in this world. As the sun sets, it becomes restless and active.
The light that streams out from the holes in the pumpkin can hypnotize and control the people and Pokémon that see it.
Spirits that wander this world are placed into Pumpkaboo’s body. They’re then moved on to the afterlife.
The pumpkin body is inhabited by a spirit trapped in this world. As the sun sets, it becomes restless and active.
It is said to carry wandering spirits to the place where they belong so they can move on.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It is said to carry wandering spirits to the place where they belong so they can move on.

pokemon:gourgeist.name: Gourgeist
pokemon:gourgeist.summary: It enwraps its prey in its hairlike arms. It sings joyfully as it observes the suffering of its prey.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It enwraps its prey in its hairlike arms. It sings joyfully as it observes the suffering of its prey.
Singing in eerie voices, they wander town streets on the night of the new moon. Anyone who hears their song is cursed.
In the darkness of a new-moon night, Gourgeist will come knocking. Whoever answers the door will be swept off to the afterlife.
Eerie cries emanate from its body in the dead of night. The sounds are said to be the wails of spirits who are suffering in the afterlife.
Singing in eerie voices, they wander town streets on the night of the new moon. Anyone who hears their song is cursed.
It enwraps its prey in its hairlike arms. It sings joyfully as it observes the suffering of its prey.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It enwraps its prey in its hairlike arms. It sings joyfully as it observes the suffering of its prey.
